name: @nimblebraininc/synapse-astro-editor
description: Natural-language editor for Astro websites. Point the agent at a GitHub repo; chat drives every edit (text, JSX, blog posts, image uploads). The bundle clones the repo, runs astro build+preview, serves the live site through a same-origin proxy, auto-commits each edit, and publishes by squash-merging into the base branch.

github_repo_url.title: GitHub repository URL
github_repo_url.description: HTTPS URL of the Astro site repo, e.g. https://github.com/you/my-site

github_token.title: GitHub personal access token
github_token.description: Fine-grained PAT with Contents: Read & Write (and Pull requests: Read & Write if auto-opening PRs).

draft_branch.title: Draft branch
draft_branch.description: Branch the editor commits to. Publish pushes this branch and opens a PR against the base branch.

base_branch.title: Base branch
base_branch.description: Production branch that drafts target. Usually main.

publish_mode.title: Publish mode
publish_mode.description: ship = squash-merge draft into base and push base (changes go live via your existing deploy). pr = push draft and open a PR against base for manual review.

tools.name: boot
tools.description: Run the full startup sequence (clone, npm install, start Astro, scan, initial render). Idempotent.

tools.name: get_workspace_status
tools.description: Lightweight workspace probe — config, clone state, current branch, runtime status.

tools.name: get_site_profile
tools.description: Return the cached Astro site profile (config presence, collections, pages, components, layouts).

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file from the repo workspace.

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Replace a unique occurrence of old_string with new_string in a file. Auto-commits to the draft branch.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write a file in the repo workspace (create or overwrite). Auto-commits to the draft branch.

tools.name: list_dir
tools.description: List entries in a directory within the repo workspace.

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search for a regex pattern across the repo workspace.

tools.name: render_preview
tools.description: Render a page through the internal Astro dev server, flatten its assets, and cache it.

tools.name: get_preview_html
tools.description: Return the cached flattened HTML for a previously rendered page (used by the UI for srcdoc).

tools.name: list_pending_changes
tools.description: Return commits on the draft branch that haven't been published yet.

tools.name: revert_change
tools.description: Revert a specific commit on the draft branch by sha.

tools.name: undo_last_change
tools.description: Revert the most recent commit on the draft branch.

tools.name: publish
tools.description: Publish accumulated draft changes. Default: squash-merge into base and push base. PR mode opens a review PR instead.

permissions_rationale.filesystem: Reads and writes files inside the repo workspace under $MPAK_WORKSPACE.
permissions_rationale.network: Clones and pushes to the configured GitHub repo; fetches rendered pages from the internal Astro dev server on localhost.
permissions_rationale.environment: Reads GITHUB_REPO_URL, GITHUB_TOKEN, and branch configuration.
permissions_rationale.subprocess: Runs `git` and `astro dev` as child processes.
